mapper.sql: ID, APPLY_DATE, BEGIN_DATE, END_DATE, DUE_DATE, PROC_INST_ID, REASON, STATUS, USER_ID
mapper.insert:
insert into t_performance
ID,
APPLY_DATE,
BEGIN_DATE,
END_DATE,
DUE_DATE,
PROC_INST_ID,
REASON,
STATUS,
USER_ID,
#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{endDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE},
#{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update t_performance
APPLY_DATE = #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE},
BEGIN_DATE = #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE},
END_DATE = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE},
DUE_DATE = #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE},
PROC_INST_ID = #{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
REASON = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update t_performance set APPLY_DATE = #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE}, BEGIN_DATE = #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE}, END_DATE = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE}, DUE_DATE = #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE}, PROC_INST_ID = #{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, REASON = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER} where ID = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
mapper.select:
select * from t_performance
APPLY_DATE = #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
BEGIN_DATE = #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
DUE_DATE = #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
END_DATE = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
PROC_INST_ID = #{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
REASON = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
order by priority

select count(*) from t_performance
APPLY_DATE = #{applyDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
BEGIN_DATE = #{beginDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
DUE_DATE = #{dueDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
END_DATE = #{endDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
PROC_INST_ID = #{procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
REASON = #{reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
STATUS = #{status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
USER_ID = #{userId,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND

select * from t_performance
APPLY_DATE = #{model.applyDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
BEGIN_DATE = #{model.beginDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
END_DATE = #{model.endDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
DUE_DATE = #{model.dueDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
PROC_INST_ID = #{model.procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
REASON = #{model.reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
STATUS = #{model.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
USER_ID = #{model.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
AND ( status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or userId like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or )
order by ${orderBy}
order by priority
limit #{start}, #{pageSize}

select count(*) from t_performance
APPLY_DATE = #{model.applyDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
BEGIN_DATE = #{model.beginDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
DUE_DATE = #{model.dueDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
END_DATE = #{model.endDate,jdbcType=DATE} AND
PROC_INST_ID = #{model.procInstId,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
REASON = #{model.reason,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
STATUS = #{model.status,jdbcType=VARCHAR} AND
USER_ID = #{model.userId,jdbcType=INTEGER} AND
AND ( status like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or userId like CONCAT("%", #{fuzzy}, "%") or )
